title: Dino Nugget BySaku
description: This adds dino nuggets to minecraft
body:
# BIG UPDATE SOON

Features:

-It adds Dino Nuggets to minecraft
they give 5 hunger bars

Made By: Saku

Have a nice day 😁

------------

Next Update infos:

-3d models

-new blocks and items

-Other Dino Nugget types (Spice or other meat and stuff)

-If you have a mod idea send a comment with the idea :)-
